name: Project Avatar
description: Real-time 3D avatar driven by agent lifecycle hooks. Your agent gets a face.

idleTimeoutMs.label: Idle Timeout (ms)
idleTimeoutMs.help: Return avatar to idle state after this many milliseconds of no events

debounceMs.label: Debounce (ms)
debounceMs.help: Minimum time between relay pushes — prevents flooding during rapid tool calls

enableAvatarTool.label: Avatar Tool
enableAvatarTool.help: Register an 'avatar' tool the LLM can call to explicitly set avatar state

suppressSkillTags.label: Suppress Skill Tags
suppressSkillTags.help: Strip [avatar:{...}] tags from output — the plugin handles signaling instead
